allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD='ClaimSync@DB2026!' psql -h claimssync-db.postgres.database.azure.com -U claimsyncadmin -d postgres -c "SELECT tf.facility_code, tf.status, sp.code AS provider_code, sp.is_active FROM claimssync.tenant_facilities tf LEFT JOIN claimssync.service_providers sp ON sp.provider_id = tf.service_provider_id ORDER BY tf.facility_code;" 2>&1)
